sentences.arabic: ذِكْرُ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى غِذَاءُ الْقُلُوبِ وَطُمَأْنِينَتُهَا.
sentences.translation: Zikr — sjećanje na Allaha Uzvišenog — hrana je za srca i njihov mir.
sentences.translationEn: The remembrance of Allah the Exalted is the nourishment and tranquility of hearts.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ: «مَثَلُ الَّذِي يَذْكُرُ رَبَّهُ وَالَّذِي لَا يَذْكُرُهُ مَثَلُ الْحَيِّ وَالْمَيِّتِ» [رَوَاهُ الْبُخَارِيُّ فِي كِتَابِ الدَّعَوَاتِ].
sentences.translation: Poslanik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, rekao je: 'Primjer onoga koji spominje svog Gospodara i onoga koji Ga ne spominje je poput živog i mrtvog.'
sentences.translationEn: The Prophet, peace be upon him, said: 'The example of one who remembers his Lord and one who does not is like the living and the dead.'

sentences.arabic: وَأَفْضَلُ الذِّكْرِ قَوْلُ «لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ»، وَمِنَ الذِّكْرِ أَيْضًا التَّسْبِيحُ وَالتَّحْمِيدُ وَالتَّكْبِيرُ.
sentences.translation: [Bilježi Buhari u Kitabu-d-deavati] Najbolji zikr je izgovaranje 'La ilahe illallah', a zikr obuhvata i tesbih, tahmid i tekbir.
sentences.translationEn: [Narrated by al-Bukhari in the Book of Supplications] The best dhikr is saying 'La ilaha illallah', and dhikr also includes tasbeeh, tahmid and takbeer.

sentences.arabic: فَيَنْبَغِي لِلْمُسْلِمِ أَنْ يُكْثِرَ مِنَ الذِّكْرِ فِي كُلِّ وَقْتٍ، فِي الصَّبَاحِ وَالْمَسَاءِ وَبَيْنَ ذَلِكَ، لِيَحْفَظَ قَلْبَهُ وَيُقَوِّيَ صِلَتَهُ بِاللَّهِ.
sentences.translation: Muslimanu dolikuje da umnožava zikr u svakom trenutku — ujutru, uvečer i između toga — kako bi čuvao svoje srce i jačao vezu s Allahom.
sentences.translationEn: A Muslim should increase his dhikr at all times — morning, evening and in between — to guard his heart and strengthen his connection with Allah.
